_note: Topics the agent must hand off to the human LaundryKhalaas team instead of resolving autonomously (RULE 6 / CLAUDE.md §6). On a keyword match the agent short-circuits with the handoff message — no LLM call and no autonomous resolution, refund, compensation, or promise — and logs a handoff decision. IMPORTANT: cancellation, reschedule and order-tracking are intentionally NOT listed here; they are handled by their own dedicated safe quick-action flows (quick_actions.json) which already hand off to the team without taking any real action. Listing them here too would double-handle them. Keywords are matched case-insensitively as substrings, so keep them specific to avoid false positives (e.g. use 'delivered late', not bare 'late').
handoff_message: Thanks for letting us know — I've flagged this for the LaundryKhalaas team and they'll follow up with you shortly.
